name: Inspect mode toggles on and highlights elements
description: When the user is on the Preview tab (HTML mode) and clicks the Inspect toggle button in the preview toolbar, inspect mode activates, showing the toggle in an active state.

planSteps.description: Click the second tab in the bottom dock to open the Preview view
Verify the preview pane is visible with an inspect-toggle button in the toolbar (look for a button with an eye icon labeled for HTML inspection)
Click the inspect-toggle button in the preview toolbar
Verify the inspect-toggle button now appears in an active/pressed state (different background or border styling than before)
Click the inspect-toggle button again to turn inspect mode off
Verify the inspect-toggle button returns to its inactive state
